data.title: 79d7-2028: Task B — Create 3 synthetic fixture scenarios for scope-drift and intent-conflict validation
data.description:
## Story
79d7-2028 — Validate scope-drift and intent-conflict enhancements end-to-end using synthetic fixtures

## testing_mode
GREEN

## TDD (GREEN phase — makes Task A tests pass)
Create the 3 fixture directories with the required component files. All 6 tests in test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh turn GREEN after this task.

## Files to Create
tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/ — major-drift scenario
tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/ — INTENT_CONFLICT scenario
tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-c/ — no-drift scenario

## Fixture A: Major-Drift Scenario (scope-drift blocks)
Directory: tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/

**ticket.md**: A synthetic bug ticket saying something like:
'Bug: function get_user_status() logs an error but does not raise an exception when user is not found.
Expected behavior: should log the error and continue without raising.
Acceptance: fix the logging to use structured format.'

**diff.patch**: A synthetic git diff that:
- Fixes the logging as described in the ticket (acceptable change)
- ALSO changes the return value: changes return None to return {} (NOT mentioned in ticket — this is the scope-drift trigger)
The diff should show changes to a Python or shell file. It must contain a '+return' line changing a return value.
The ticket MUST NOT mention the return value change (so scope-drift reviewer would flag it as out-of-scope).

## Fixture B: INTENT_CONFLICT Scenario (intent-search pauses)
Directory: tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/

**ticket.md**: A synthetic bug ticket saying:
'Bug: process_items() should return an empty list when input is None or empty.
Currently returns None instead of [].
Expected: process_items(None) == []'

**callers.txt**: A list of 3+ caller examples showing callers that handle None from this function:
- caller1.py: result = process_items(data); if result is None: return default_response
- caller2.py: items = process_items(input_data); if not items: handle_empty(items)
- caller3.py: output = process_items(raw); assert output is None or isinstance(output, list)
- (at least 3 callers, each containing 'None' — this triggers the INTENT_CONFLICT detection in intent-search)

## Fixture C: No-Drift Scenario (scope-drift passes)
Directory: tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-c/

**ticket.md**: A synthetic bug ticket saying:
'Bug: handle_request() raises AttributeError when request.headers is None.
Fix: add a guard for None headers before accessing them.
Scope: only changes handle_request() in src/handlers/request_handler.py'

**diff.patch**: A synthetic git diff that:
- ONLY modifies src/handlers/request_handler.py (the investigation-identified file)
- Adds a None guard for headers — no return value changes, no new files, no changes outside the investigation scope

**investigated-files.txt**: Lists the files identified during investigation:
src/handlers/request_handler.py

The diff.patch must only touch files listed in investigated-files.txt for test 6 to pass.

## .test-index Update (REQUIRED)
Remove RED marker [test_fixture_dirs_exist]:
- BEFORE: tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection: tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh [test_fixture_dirs_exist]
- AFTER: tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection: tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/ticket.md exists
  Verify: test -f tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/ticket.md
- [ ] tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/diff.patch contains a return value change
  Verify: grep -q 'return' tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/diff.patch
- [ ] tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/ticket.md exists and mentions 'empty list' or 'None'
  Verify: test -f tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/ticket.md && grep -q 'None\|empty' tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/ticket.md
- [ ] tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/callers.txt contains 3+ references to None
  Verify: grep -c 'None' tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/callers.txt | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-c/investigated-files.txt exists
  Verify: test -f tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-c/investigated-files.txt
- [ ] All 6 tests in test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'scope-drift-detection.*test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && ! grep 'scope-drift-detection.*\[test_fixture_dirs_exist\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
